validation.checkFields: Please check the form fields for errors
validation.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com)
validation.emailMin: Email is too short — at least 5 characters
validation.emailMax: Email is too long — maximum 255 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordWeak: Use at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one digit
validation.passwordsMismatch: Passwords do not match — both fields must be the same
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

oauth.telegramWebOnly: Sign in with Telegram — available on web only
oauth.telegramHint: Confirm login in the Telegram app (message from «Telegram»)
oauth.telegramNativeHint: Opens web version — sign in there and return to the app

errors.userExists: User with this email already exists
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection
errors.tokenExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again
errors.refreshFailed: Failed to refresh session. Please sign in again
